display.purpose: Page-level product headings and mission titles.

headline.purpose: Numeric stats and high-emphasis dashboard values.

title.purpose: Card titles, commitment titles, and compact section headings.

body.purpose: Main product copy, descriptions, and form content.

label.purpose: Short metadata labels and compact markers.

shadows.name: overlay-deep
shadows.purpose: Profile dropdowns and anchored menus on dark surfaces.

shadows.name: mobile-sheet
shadows.purpose: Mobile navigation trigger or sheet elements that need separation.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default hover, border, and color state transition.

motion.name: shell-collapse
motion.purpose: Sidebar collapse and shell-level structural transitions.

motion.name: skeleton-pulse
motion.purpose: Skeleton loading blocks, disabled under reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-emphasis product action on a dark surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; min-height: 38px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 9px 16px; border: 1px solid #EFEFEF; border-radius: 8px; background: #EFEFEF; color: #111111; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 140ms ease, color 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease, transform 140ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #FFFFFF; border-color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8A838; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.985); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { cursor: default; opacity: 0.45; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet product action for secondary choices.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; min-height: 38px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 9px 16px; border: 1px solid #242424; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #EFEFEF; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; transition: background 140ms ease, color 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease, transform 140ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #1A1A1A; border-color: #333333; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8A838; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.985); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Compact text field for product forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 7px; color: #888888; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 650; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; padding: 11px 12px; border: 1px solid #242424; border-radius: 8px; outline: none; background: #141414; color: #EFEFEF; font: inherit; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-field input:focus { border-color: #333333; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8A838; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Flat metric card with tonal separation and tabular value.
components.css: .ds-stat { min-width: 0; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #242424; border-radius: 10px; background: #1A1A1A; color: #EFEFEF; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif; } .ds-stat span, .ds-stat small { display: block; color: #888888; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-stat strong { display: block; margin-top: 8px; color: #EFEFEF; font-size: 26px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.045em; line-height: 1; } .ds-stat small { margin-top: 6px; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Compact app-shell navigation with quiet active state.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 8px 18px; border: none; border-left: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: #888888; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease, background 120ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.035); color: #EFEFEF; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8A838; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-nav-item.ds-active { border-left-color: #EFEFEF; color: #EFEFEF; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }

components.name: AI-Origin Note
components.description: Subtle treatment for AI-generated content that needs provenance without costume.
components.html:
Coach synthesis

Patterns are emerging around delayed commitments after high-output days.
components.css: .ds-ai-note { padding: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(232,168,56,0.22); border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(232,168,56,0.06); color: #EFEFEF; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif; } .ds-ai-note span { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #E8A838; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.09em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-ai-note p { margin: 0; color: #EFEFEF; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; }

narrative.overview: TaskFlow is a compact operating surface for people who already know what they are trying to improve. The visual language is restrained, dark, and precise: black canvas, near-black panels, fine borders, compact type, and state changes that happen quickly enough to stay out of the user's way.
keyCharacteristics: Dark monochromatic product shell with light-mode support on select task surfaces.
System/SF typography for speed, density, and native product trust.
Thin borders and tonal layers instead of decorative shadows.
Amber appears only for meaningful semantic moments, especially achievement or AI-origin cues.
Motion is brief and functional, never expressive for its own sake.

rules.name: The Rare Amber Rule
rules.body: Amber must not become decoration. Use it for completion, AI-sourced content, or a genuinely meaningful state, and keep it below roughly 5-10% of any screen.

rules.name: The Native Product Type Rule
rules.body: Use system/SF typography for authenticated product UI. Inter and Syne exist in older marketing surfaces, but product screens should prioritize native density and clarity.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Resting product surfaces use borders and tonal contrast. Shadows are reserved for overlays, temporary sheets, or hover/focus states that need physical stacking.

dos: Do keep TaskFlow in a command-center posture: dark, compact, precise, and accountable.
Do reserve #E8A838 for completion, achievement, or AI-origin signals.
Do use one-pixel borders, tonal layers, and restrained opacity changes before adding decorative color or shadows.
Do preserve reduced-motion alternatives; state transitions should be functional and fast.
donts: Don't make TaskFlow look like Notion's soft minimalism, Todoist's chirpy productivity, pastel gamification, startup pink-and-blue gradients, or glowing SaaS cards.
Don't use confetti-like streaks, bouncy encouragement loops, or motion that celebrates rather than orients.
Don't use cards inside cards or decorative card grids as a default layout answer.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't let amber become a generic brand color.
